name: polygraph-litmus
description: Grade and verify MCP servers A–F with the open polygraph litmus — lookup published grades in under a second, or run the behavioral harness now.
long_description: polygraph adds a pre-flight trust check for MCP servers. check_server reads a server's published behavioral grade (A–F) from polygraph.so in under a second; run_litmus grades a server now by exercising its live tool surface (tool-output injection, egress in a default-deny Docker sandbox, sensitive-data canaries, adversarial input). Also: list_servers, request_grade, run_skill_litmus (static skill grading), verify_attestation (onchain proof on Base). Every grade is reproducible — the harness is open source.
